task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
AUTHENTICATED TODO API

Dataflow:
POST /api/register {email, password} → validate → save to Users → 201
POST /api/login {email, password} → lookup User → validate password → 200 {token}
GET /api/todos → requires auth → filter by caller's id → 200 [todos]
POST /api/todos {title} → requires auth → save with caller's id → 201 {todo}
*/

build for javascript backend

owner is 'test@example.com'
allow signup and login

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

# Register endpoint
when user sends credentials to /api/register:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required, min 8
  existing = get all Users where email is credentials's email
  guard existing is empty or 'User already exists'
  create user_obj:
    email is credentials's email
    password is credentials's password
  saved = save user_obj as new User
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint
when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required
  users = get all Users where email is credentials's email
  guard users is not empty or 'Invalid credentials'
  user = first of users
  guard user's password is credentials's password or 'Invalid credentials'
  send back { user_id is user's id, token is 'jwt_token_placeholder' } with status 200

# Get all todos for authenticated user
when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is caller's id
  send back todos

# Create todo for authenticated user
when user sends todo to /api/todos:
  requires login
  validate todo:
    title is text, required
  create todo_obj:
    title is todo's title
    done is false
    user_id is caller's id
  saved = save todo_obj as new Todo
  send back saved with status 201
